blended.narrative: Troll Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,748 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
